title: Dryline Outer Road
notes: Art upgrade for the old B3 placeholder/test route.
Connects A3 Dryline Outer Route, C3 Main Civic Gate, and B4 Black Road Cut.
Dryline road with Sable watch hut, route scanner shed, Black Road cache, route booth, and windblown escape lanes.
Ground items render below Donny/NPC bodies.
